description_long: This house features a spacious, multi-level design with a combination of red-tiled gable and hip roofs, white exterior walls, and several prominent entryways. The front facade is accentuated by a circular driveway, landscaped greenery, and a central entrance flanked by two smaller porches. The rear of the house opens to a large, enclosed backyard with a row of palm trees and a privacy wall, suggesting a suburban or upscale urban setting. Multiple windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes architectural details such as overhanging eaves, decorative columns, and a mix of flat and sloped roof sections. The overall appearance is reminiscent of Mediterranean or Spanish Revival styles, blending elegance with functionality.
description: A large, multi-story house with red-tiled roofs, white walls, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front and rear yards. The design features a circular driveway, prominent entryways, and Mediterranean architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, landscaped greenery, and symmetrical facade with red-tiled roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, multiple roof sections, and the driveway leading to the rear yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, row of palm trees, privacy wall, and secondary entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended rooflines, side windows, and the transition between front and rear yards.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, flanked by columns and covered porches, circular driveway, and decorative landscaping
